instruction: Detail steps an organization might take to mitigate such vulnerabilities.
input: Insufficient input validation in SVC_ECC_PRIMITIVE system call in a compromised user application or ABL may allow an attacker to corrupt ASP (AMD Secure Processor) OS memory which may lead to potential loss of integrity and availability.
output: Organizations can mitigate this vulnerability by applying patches from the vendor, implementing strict input validation checks, and ensuring regular security audits to detect and rectify similar issues.
